summary: The student's current level is around Band 7, with some weaknesses in Writing Task 2, Speaking Part 2, and Listening. To reach the target Band 7.5, the student needs to work on extending and supporting ideas in Writing, improving vocabulary and sentence structures in Speaking, and enhancing listening skills.
priorities: Improve Writing Task 2 by extending and supporting ideas
Enhance Speaking Part 2 by using more varied vocabulary and sentence structures
Improve Listening skills by practicing with a variety of question types

tasks: Practise writing a full essay for Task 2 using a Cambridge IELTS practice test book (e.g. cambridge-19-test1)
Review and analyse the essay for areas of improvement, focusing on extending and supporting ideas
Practise speaking on a Part 2 topic using a cue card (e.g. cambridge-9-test2)
Record the speech and review it for areas of improvement, focusing on vocabulary and sentence structures
Practise listening to a variety of question types (e.g. multiple choice, note completion) using a Cambridge IELTS practice test book (e.g. cambridge-3-test2)
Review and analyse the answers for areas of improvement
Practise reading a passage and answering questions (e.g. cambridge-18-test3)
Review and analyse the answers for areas of improvement
Practise writing a full essay for Task 2 using a Cambridge IELTS practice test book (e.g. cambridge-18-test3)
Review and analyse the essay for areas of improvement, focusing on extending and supporting ideas
Practise speaking on a Part 2 topic using a cue card (e.g. cambridge-18-test3)
Record the speech and review it for areas of improvement, focusing on vocabulary and sentence structures
Take a full timed practice test using a Cambridge IELTS practice test book (e.g. cambridge-19-test1)
Review and analyse the results for areas of improvement

resources: Cambridge IELTS practice test books (e.g. cambridge-19-test1, cambridge-9-test2, cambridge-3-test2, cambridge-18-test3)
Specific practice techniques (e.g. note completion, multiple choice)
